problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing — specifically Fear memory reconsolidation — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
